sessions.name: Intervals
sessions.notes: Warm up 15 min easy. Main set: 9x400m (rec 75s). Cool down 10 min easy.

sessions.name: Threshold
sessions.notes: Warm up 15 min easy. Main set: 6x3 min (rec 75s). Cool down 10 min easy.

sessions.name: Easy + strides
sessions.notes: Easy effort. Add 6×20s relaxed strides after (full recovery). (Guardrail: rebalanced easy distance)

sessions.name: Long run
sessions.notes: Easy effort throughout. Keep it relaxed and comfortable.

sessions.name: Intervals
sessions.notes: Warm up 15 min easy. Main set: 5x800m (rec 2 min). Cool down 10 min easy.

sessions.name: Threshold
sessions.notes: Warm up 15 min easy. Main set: 20 min tempo. Cool down 10 min easy.

sessions.name: Easy run
sessions.notes: Easy effort. During the run add 6×20s cadence/form pick-ups (smooth, not sprinting) with 60–90s easy between. (Guardrail: rebalanced easy distance)

sessions.name: Long run
sessions.notes: Easy effort. Finish with last 8 min at controlled tempo (not all-out).

sessions.name: Threshold
sessions.notes: Warm up 15 min easy. Main set: 2x3 min (rec 1 min). Cool down 10 min easy.

sessions.name: Easy run
sessions.notes: Easy effort. Keep it relaxed. (Typical 35–60 min) (Guardrail: rebalanced easy distance) (Guardrail: capped largest easy run) (Adjusted to close residual drift)

sessions.name: Long run
sessions.notes: Keep it easy — deload week. (Guardrail: rebalanced from oversized easy run)
